name: -c
--config
options.description: Use this configuration, overriding .eslintrc.* config options if present

options.name: --parser
options.description: Specify the parser to be used

options.name: --resolve-plugins-relative-to
options.description: A folder where plugins should be resolved from

options.name: --rulesdir
options.description: Use additional rules from this directory

options.name: --fix-dry-run
options.description: Automatically fix problems without saving the changes to the file system

options.name: --fix-type
options.description: Specify the types of fixes to apply

options.name: --no-ignore
options.description: Disable use of ignore files and patterns

options.name: --ignore-pattern
options.description: Pattern of files to ignore (in addition to those in .eslintignore)

options.name: --stdin-filename
options.description: Specify filename to process STDIN as

options.name: --max-warnings
options.description: Number of warnings to trigger nonzero exit code

name: -o
--output-file
options.description: Specify file to write report to

options.name: --no-inline-config
options.description: Prevent comments from changing config or rules

options.name: --report-unused-disable-directives
options.description: Adds reported errors for unused eslint-disable-directives

options.name: --cache-location
options.description: Path to the cache file or directory

options.name: --cache-strategy
options.description: Strategy to use for detecting changed files

options.name: --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
options.description: Prevent errors when pattern is unmatched

options.name: --print-config
options.description: Print the configuration for the give file
